diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support, this is Sam. How can I help?
[Caller] I've done 82 pulls on the Furina banner, no 5-star, I spent 100 dollars on this and I'm seriously about to uninstall.
[Agent] I totally hear the frustration, and honestly, 82 pulls without the character you want is rough. Before anything else — I really appreciate you calling instead of walking away. Let me pull up your account and look at exactly where you are. UID and email on file?
[Caller] 703321876, sophiem at email dot com.
[Agent] Thank you, Sophie. Verified. OK, I'm looking at your pity counter on the Furina Character Event banner. Confirmed — 82 pulls since your last 5-star. Here's what I want to share with you, because I think it'll change how you feel about where you are. The hard guarantee is at pull 90, but soft pity kicks in at 75, and the drop rate between 75 and 89 is enormously boosted. Statistically, the vast majority of 5-stars on this banner land between pulls 76 and 83. You are, right now, sitting in the highest-probability zone you'll ever be in.
[Caller] Wait, really?
[Agent] Really. From where you're sitting, Furina is statistically imminent — usually within the next one to ten pulls. And even if the dice don't roll your way by pull 90, you are one hundred percent guaranteed a 5-star at 90. So the worst case is you wait 8 more pulls and you get her.
[Caller] Oh. I genuinely didn't know the rate was that much better. The game doesn't really explain that.
[Agent] You're not the first person to tell me that — the soft pity mechanic is real but not super visible in the UI. Let me do two things for you. First, I'll enable in-game pull tips so your next wish screen will show you exactly where you are relative to soft and hard pity. Second, I'll send you a quick infographic by email that explains the math, so you can share it with friends if they're confused too.
[Caller] That would actually be really helpful. Thank you.
[Agent] Done on both. Anything else while we're here?
[Caller] No, honestly — I came in ready to quit and you completely turned this around. Thank you for actually listening.
[Agent] That means everything, Sophie. I'm rooting for you — go get Furina. Have a great day.
[Caller] Thanks, I will. Bye.
